creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 196346
Patch file generated with svn diff

Hi,

The _cksum file has been moved out from the BSD directory after a complete rewrite and is now located in the Unix directory:
https://gitlab.com/zsh-org/zsh/commit/64ef1eddfd4fa79a0720945e189cf7c3a44bde9c

Pending the next Zsh release, the attached patch file fixes the completion of checksum utilities now available in release 5.1.1.
